2353010.name: Pale Dots
2353010.description:
The title has been changed from STRANGE SHADOW.

Game information will be updated as soon as it’s ready.

The screenshots I posted before were quite old, so I’ve removed them.

But the core concept remains the same: it’s a game about escaping from a planet inhabited by something enormous.

Also, although the game was originally planned for a 2025 release, I will be postponing it due to development circumstances.

I’m very sorry…

I’ll share an updated release window as soon as it’s decided.
2353010.supported_languages: 英语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 日语
